prompt: Japanese Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock print style. A lone traveller descends a steep mountain path in careful deliberate steps, always moving downward toward a glowing valley below. The mountain has clearly defined contour lines showing elevation. Flat unmodulated areas of color — deep indigo sky, ochre earth, pale mist in the valley. Bold outlines in the manner of Katsushika Hokusai. Visible woodgrain texture. No photographic shading — only flat color fills separated by strong black lines. Mount Fuji visible in the far distance. Traditional washi paper texture. No text, no labels.
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated color fills, bold Hokusai-style outlines, visible woodgrain texture, high-contrast figure-ground, indigo and ochre palette, contour lines encoding elevation — no photographic shading.
